𝗣𝗢𝗟𝗬𝗧𝗘𝗥𝗠 | To provide users with advanced, real-time analytics and monitoring capabilities for Polymarket prediction markets directly within their terminal environment.  📈 Growing!

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide users with advanced, real-time analytics and monitoring capabilities for Polymarket prediction markets directly within their terminal environment.
📅 Created: Oct 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Terminal-based monitoring and analytics for Polymarket
✅ 20+ advanced analytics features (whale tracking, insider detection, arbitrage scanning, signal-based predictions, wash trade detection, UMA dispute risk analysis, market risk grading)
✅ 73+ interactive TUI screens with menu navigation and help
✅ Terminal-native visualization (ASCII charts, sparklines, depth charts)
✅ Stateful local database (SQLite) for bookmarks, alerts, trade journal, etc.
✅ Zero custody risk (view-only wallet features)
✅ Comprehensive testing (975+ tests)


◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐ 86 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 17 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

PolyTerm is a powerful, terminal-based monitoring and analytics tool for Polymarket prediction markets. It provides advanced features for tracking market shifts, whale activity, insider patterns, arbitrage opportunities, and signal-based predictions directly from the command line.

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/NYTEMODEONLY/polyterm

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗦𝗣𝗥𝗘𝗔𝗗𝗣𝗔𝗣𝗘𝗥 | To allow users to set a single, high-resolution image as a wallpaper that spans across multiple monitors on macOS, providing a unified and visually appealing desktop background.  🔥 Super Hot!

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To allow users to set a single, high-resolution image as a wallpaper that spans across multiple monitors on macOS, providing a unified and visually appealing desktop background.
📅 Created: Nov 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

✅ Visual Positioning
✅ Live Preview
✅ Flip & Scale
✅ Save Presets
✅ Multi-Monitor Smart Detection
✅ High Quality Rendering


✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

SpreadPaper is a native macOS application designed to seamlessly spread a single high-resolution wallpaper across multiple connected monitors. It offers a user-friendly interface for positioning, scaling, and flipping images to create a cohesive desktop aesthetic, overcoming the limitations of macOS's default wallpaper handling for multi-display setups.

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/spreadpaper/SpreadPaper

𝗠𝗔𝗖𝗢𝗣𝗧𝗜𝗠𝗜𝗭𝗘𝗥 | To clean, optimize, and manage macOS system resources and installed applications through a user-friendly interface.  🔥 Super Hot!

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🍎 Swift 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To clean, optimize, and manage macOS system resources and installed applications through a user-friendly interface.
📅 Created: Dec 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ System Monitor (CPU, Memory, Disk)
✅ App Uninstaller with Residual File Detection
✅ Junk Cleaner (System, App, Browser Cache, Logs)
✅ System Optimizer (Startup Items, Memory Release)
✅ Large File Finder
✅ Trash Manager
✅ Deep Clean for Orphaned Files
✅ File Explorer with Terminal Integration
✅ SwiftUI Interface
✅ Multi-Language Support (EN/ZH)


⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

MacOptimizer is a comprehensive system optimization and app management tool for macOS, built with SwiftUI. It offers a suite of eight modules to clean junk files, uninstall applications completely, manage startup items, release memory, find large files, manage the trash, and explore the file system.

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗡𝗘𝗧𝗪𝗢𝗥𝗞𝗜𝗡𝗚-𝗧𝗢𝗢𝗟𝗕𝗢𝗫 | To provide system administrators with a comprehensive, self-hosted, and offline-capable suite of networking tools for diagnostics, analysis, and security.  🔥 Super Hot!

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Svelte 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide system administrators with a comprehensive, self-hosted, and offline-capable suite of networking tools for diagnostics, analysis, and security.
📅 Created: Sep 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

✅ Offline-first functionality
✅ 100+ networking tools and utilities
✅ Self-hosted deployment options (Docker, Node, Static)
✅ SvelteKit + TypeScript development stack
✅ Comprehensive testing suite (Unit, API, E2E)
✅ Customizable layouts and theming
✅ Multi-language support
✅ Bookmarking capabilities

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Networking Toolbox is an offline-first, self-hosted web application providing over 100 essential networking tools and utilities for system administrators. Built with SvelteKit and TypeScript, it offers a comprehensive suite of diagnostic and analysis features accessible without an internet connection.

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂
